2017.reason: [The line number recorded here may be incorrect because currentLineNum corresponds to the token after the expression, not the last token of the expression itself. According to the problem description, for missing semicolon errors, "the error line number corresponds to the line where the last non-terminal before the semicolon is located."]

2118.reason: [Using match() in conditional expressions causes incorrect output because match() has side effects - it adds tokens to outputList even when the condition is just being evaluated. This will output multiple tokens incorrectly during condition checking. Should compare currentType directly instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Using match() in conditional expressions causes incorrect output because match() has side effects - it adds tokens to outputList even when the condition is just being evaluated. This will output multiple tokens incorrectly during condition checking. Should compare currentType directly instead.]
